description: Dark brown wallet with stitch detailing, has a pocket on the side, which holds a detachable card holderDetachable card holder has three card slots and an ID card slot, embossed branding on the frontHas two main compartments - the left slot has two card holders, one ID card holder and two slip poketsThe right fold has a zipped coin pocket with a pull tab, one card holder and a slip pocketWarranty: 180 days against manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
